positive: A mystical central composition featuring a stylized phoenix or celestial owl, rendered in strong, flowing lines. The creature is surrounded by intricate, bioluminescent tropical flora (like stylized monstera leaves and exotic orchid forms) and interconnected mandalas. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau and Neo-Victorian etching, executed with highly contrasting black and cream/deep indigo color palette. Focus on clean, solid silhouettes and geometric linework suitable for direct textile printing. High detail, symmetrical composition, perfect for apparel artwork, mystical vaporwave aesthetic, clean vector illustration, graphic novel quality.
negative: blur, low quality, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, messy, noise, grain, ugly, deformed, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low contrast
